title: Restore inherited host quality gates
description: At convergence HEAD 9b3d7ba8, required host gates inherited failures from origin/main: Ruff 9 findings in unchanged tests; cargo fmt differences in 10 unchanged/pre-existing locations; Clippy manual_is_multiple_of in unchanged frame_parser.rs; strict rustdoc 13 unchanged documentation errors; pytest-cov is absent from the locked dev environment although CI invokes --cov. Mypy also reports 105 errors, 99 inherited and 6 in convergence-changed aiocoap sites, but mypy is not currently a CI command. Fix this outside the convergence freeze or explicitly redefine the baseline gate contract; do not mask failures.
acceptance_criteria: Locked Python CI command including coverage, Ruff, Rust fmt, Clippy -D warnings, and strict rustdoc pass from a clean environment; mypy status and scope are explicitly decided without broad ignores.
close_reason: Restored ASan/UBSan + no-skip host gates via CMake/prj.conf updates, test script/CI fixes; ran+fixed cargo test/pytest/west -t run with sanitizers; fixed all Ruff/Clippy/rustdoc/fmt/cov/mypy issues without ignores or weakening; conventional commit
